rootCause: Wheel Encoder (71fafa9a-3998-4763-a63a-279acc4ca603) was required by robotics quests but had no buy price and was not produced by any process. Existing quest completable simulation defaulted to treating BETA_PLACEHOLDER items as obtainable, masking the regression.
resolution: Assigned an explicit buy price to Wheel Encoder, changed obtainability simulation defaults to exclude BETA_PLACEHOLDER shortcuts, and added a regression test that enforces direct obtainability for quest-required items via price or process outputs.
